mapper.sql: id, modelNo, supplierId, orgCountryId, stdDlvDay, stdDlvDateMaxNumber, statusCode, insertTime, insertUser, updateTime, updateUser, sourcetype
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_bs_queryprice_newmodel
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into dbo.ops_bs_queryprice_newmodel
id,
modelNo,
supplierId,
orgCountryId,
stdDlvDay,
stdDlvDateMaxNumber,
statusCode,
insertTime,
insertUser,
updateTime,
updateUser,
sourcetype,

#{modelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER},

#{insertuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sourcetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_bs_queryprice_newmodel
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orgCountryId = #{record.orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stdDlvDay = #{record.stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stdDlvDateMaxNumber = #{record.stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER},
statusCode = #{record.statuscode,jdbcType=CHAR},
insertTime = #{record.inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
insertUser = #{record.insertuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateUser = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sourcetype = #{record.sourcetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_bs_queryprice_newmodel set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orgCountryId = #{record.orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stdDlvDay = #{record.stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stdDlvDateMaxNumber = #{record.stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, statusCode = #{record.statuscode,jdbcType=CHAR}, insertTime = #{record.inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, insertUser = #{record.insertuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateUser = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sourcetype = #{record.sourcetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_bs_queryprice_newmodel
modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
supplierId = #{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orgCountryId = #{orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stdDlvDay = #{stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stdDlvDateMaxNumber = #{stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER},
statusCode = #{statuscode,jdbcType=CHAR},
insertTime = #{inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
insertUser = #{insertuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateUser = #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sourcetype = #{sourcetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.ops_bs_queryprice_newmodel set modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, supplierId = #{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orgCountryId = #{orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stdDlvDay = #{stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stdDlvDateMaxNumber = #{stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, statusCode = #{statuscode,jdbcType=CHAR}, insertTime = #{inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, insertUser = #{insertuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateUser = #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sourcetype = #{sourcetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
